com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class AuthorizeCard

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard

  • public class AuthorizeCard
extends FullIntegrationBase
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to authorize card.
    Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCallback
      Call back from POS Service for authorize card command
      static interface  AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCurrentStepCallback
      Callback for the one step of authorize card procedure.
      static class  AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
      The request data for Authorize Card command.
      static class  AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeResponse
      The response data of Authorize.
      static interface  AuthorizeCard.EnterPinCallBack 
      static class  AuthorizeCard.EnterPinCallBackExpand
      The extended class of EnterPinCallBack

    • Constructor Detail

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static AuthorizeCard getInstance()

      • authorize

        public static void authorize(Context context,
                             AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest request,
                             CommSetting commSetting,
                             <any> posLinkCallback,
                             AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCallback authorizeCallback)

        This is a wrapper to use PosLink to do communication with ManageRequest.TransType = 19, AUTHORIZECARD .
        Used to authorize contact EMV card.

        When authorizeCallback is non null and commSetting is AIDL, that means the POS Service runs on same device as yours.
        You will need to handle the UI display and use handleInputPinStart(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.EnterPinCallBack, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) to finish following steps.

        Parameters:
        context - App context
        request - authorize request
        commSetting - Comm Setting
        posLinkCallback - NonNull. You need to handle start and finish.
        authorizeCallback - Nullable. Call back from POS Service.

      • handleInputPinStart

        public void handleInputPinStart(AuthorizeCard.EnterPinCallBack enterPinCallBack,
                                FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCallback.onEnterPinStart() You must call this after AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCallback.onEnterPinStart().
        Parameters:
        enterPinCallBack - Indicate the operations of users for enter pin.
        More callbacks can be found AuthorizeCard.EnterPinCallBackExpand
        currentStepCallback - Indicate whether this input validate.
        If you want to know whether this input is the last input opportunity, use AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCurrentStepCallback.

      • unregisterAll

        protected void unregisterAll()
        Overrides:
        unregisterAll in class FullIntegrationBase

      • abort

        public boolean abort()
        Returns:
        whether abort success. In some steps you cannot abort.
